compiled_state.title: Tier E: delete the bash dispatcher -> argparse cli.py + port ~20 live cmds + zero _engine/*.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Why
Tier E is the LAST tier of the bash->Python strangler-fig migration (story adult-oxide-slave,
8784-c2d7-c395-4478). Tiers A-D are DONE/retired; Python is the sole live impl for reads, leaf
writes, compute, and the write/sync core. The story's end-state AC is literally "no _engine/*.sh":
one implementation + three facades (lib/CLI/MCP), zero standalone shell tests, no embedded heredocs.

Grounding against the live tree (2026-06-12) shows this requires porting ~20 STILL-LIVE bash commands
the dispatcher routes to (init, fsck, fsck-recover, transition, reopen, claim, compact, compact-all,
scratch, clarity-check, check-ac, quality-check, summary, exists, resolve, format, list-descendants,
delete, get-file-impact, get-verify-commands, bridge-status, purge-bridge) -- not just deleting dead
wrappers -- plus rewiring the reconciler off the compat shims + engine_env, relocating ticket_txn.py
off the bare _engine/event_append.py, deleting the dispatcher + compat shims, and translating all 107
.sh test files to pytest. Plan reviewed by opus subagent (REVISE->APPROVE).

## What
Execute the approved cluster plan, ONE COMMAND AT A TIME (the established §2 per-command protocol:
characterize -> port reusing rebar.reducer/graph/_commands/_store/_engine_support -> byte-parity
goldens -> cut library+argparse to in-process -> dogfood soak -> delete bash + translate suite), each
in a clean green commit. Tier E has NO kill-switch; rollback is git revert. Clusters:
- E0: argparse cli.py skeleton + help/usage/error goldens (byte-identical to the bash dispatcher via a
  golden-as-package-data help action) + the auto-init/freshness middleware (port _ensure_initialized).
  Transitional subprocess fallback for not-yet-ported commands. NO deletions.
- E1: cut the console_scripts entrypoint over to argparse (dispatcher still exists for fallbacks).
- E2: port read-ish/quality cmds (clarity-check, check-ac, quality-check, summary, exists, resolve,
  format, list-descendants, get-file-impact, get-verify-commands, delete).
- E3: port write/lifecycle cmds (transition, reopen, claim, compact, compact-all, scratch).
- E4: port init / fsck / fsck-recover (highest risk; isolated soak each).
- E5: port bridge-status / purge-bridge.
- E5b: rewire rebar_reconciler off ticket_reducer/bare event_append/engine_env.
- E5c: relocate ticket_txn.py; delete the bare _engine/event_append.py.
- E6: rewire remaining compat-shim importers; delete the shims; assert-gone tests.
- E7: delete the dispatcher _engine/rebar + engine_env/PYTHONPATH machinery + engine_dir zipimport
  assertion + jq prereq + flock(1)/mkdir discovery; retire machinery tests in the same commit.
- E8: translate the 107 .sh suites to pytest; delete suite-engine.sh/assert.sh/collector.
- E9: docs (architecture.md offender table -> empty; bash-migration.md §7 DONE) + exhaustive
  live-dogfood validation + soak-evidence comment + close adult-oxide-slave.

## Scope
The whole remaining bash engine, one command/cluster at a time over multiple sessions; each cluster
independently green + revertible. NOT in scope: store/locking/event-schema changes (ratified sound);
dropping the dual-leg mkdir lock (release-level follow-up, see Tier D note).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] cli.py is a real argparse CLI over rebar._commands/_reads/_engine_support (three facades, one impl)
- [ ] Help/usage/error output byte-identical to the bash dispatcher (goldens pinned before cutover)
- [ ] All ~20 live commands ported in-process; library no longer subprocesses the dispatcher
- [ ] reconciler + ticket_txn.py rewired off compat shims / bare event_append / engine_env
- [ ] Zero _engine/*.sh; compat shims deleted with assert-gone tests; dispatcher + machinery deleted
- [ ] Zero standalone shell tests (tests/**/*.sh == 0); suites translated to pytest, suite green
- [ ] Exhaustive live-dogfood validation passed; soak-evidence recorded; adult-oxide-slave closed

comments.body: STANDING GATE (user directive, 2026-06-12): Any Tier E cluster that changes Jira-related code MUST, before close, run a LIVE end-to-end probe against the real Jira instance using the DIG project (JIRA_PROJECT=DIG; JIRA_URL/JIRA_USER/JIRA_API_TOKEN are present in the env). Validation must (a) exercise EVERY field bidirectionally — outbound rebar->Jira AND inbound Jira->rebar, round-tripped per field (scope: rebar_reconciler/jira_fields.py, apply_outbound.py/outbound_differ.py, apply_inbound.py/inbound_differ.py/inbound_translate.py, adf.py), and (b) cover all scenarios incl. edge cases. Applies to: E5 (bridge-status, purge-bridge) and E5b (reconciler rewire off ticket_reducer/bare event_append/engine_env). Each of those tickets will carry this as a hard AC + set_verify_commands; create->validate->delete throwaway DIG issues and report. NOT applicable to E0-E4/E6-E9 (no Jira changes there). The bash->python migration must preserve byte/semantic Jira behavior, so the live DIG probe is the parity proof that the rewire didn't alter the compatibility surface.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: SEQUENCING CORRECTION (grounded 2026-06-12): the bash test suites invoke $DISPATCHER = src/rebar/_engine/ticket (the bash dispatcher) DIRECTLY, not the argparse `rebar` console script. So porting a command to argparse in-process does NOT redirect the dispatcher suites — the bash impl (dispatcher arm + ticket-lib-api.sh function + any standalone .sh) stays live and exercised until the dispatcher AND its suites are retired together. Consequence: per-command bash DELETION is blocked until E7/E8. Revised flow for E2-E5 per command: (1) port to rebar.* reusing reducer/graph/resolver/output, (2) route argparse in-process (new in-process set), (3) rewire the library function off _run to in-process, (4) add a golden parity test pinning python==bash (the dual-run discipline; no kill-switch in Tier E). NO bash deletion in E2-E5. Deletion consolidates in E7 (dispatcher + engine_env machinery + ticket-lib*.sh + standalone gate .sh) and E8 (dispatcher suites -> pytest), sequenced so the dispatcher and the suites that call it retire together (E8 before/with E7). Each parity test is deleted with its bash second-impl in E7/E8 (the a93885e pattern).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
=== CLEAN HANDOFF (2026-06-13) ===
PUSHED: origin/main @ 3bdf1897 (all Tier E work + CI fix + handoff doc). Working tree clean.
Full handoff plan committed at docs/tier-e-execution-plan.md (opus-reviewed E0-E9 decomposition + resume point + env + gates + risks).

DONE (green, closed children): E0 argparse CLI+goldens+middleware (knobby-mile-gob, 3a53e20); E1 entrypoint cutover (pelt-twig-taboo, c64c889); E2 read-ish/quality (grubby-logic-hack) = E2.1 field-reads (a3a7eb2), E2.2 exists/resolve/format (ee29e91), E2.3 list-descendants (d81650a), E2.4 gates clarity/check-ac/quality/summary (482bbed). Pre-existing CI fix (dizzy-splice-coven bug, 9760b2b): REPO_ROOT .tickets-tracker leak + macOS tmp-race. Checkpoint full suite 1660 passed/0 failed.

IN-PROCESS NOW: all category-A + get-file-impact, get-verify-commands, exists, resolve, format, list-descendants, clarity-check, check-ac, quality-check, summary. Bash kept as parity-pinned 2nd impl (suites call $DISPATCHER directly; deletion back-loads to E7/E8).

RESUME HERE: E3 write/lifecycle (transition, reopen, claim, compact, compact-all, scratch, delete), COUPLED to E5c (relocate ticket_txn.py into rebar._commands/_store — it does a bare 'import event_append' and can't go on the in-process sys.path without violating the test_engine_dir guard). This touches the single locked write path + exit-10 optimistic-concurrency contract: do the opus-reviewed sub-plan FIRST, then re-run the concurrency matrix (-m integration). Then E4 init/fsck (highest risk), E5/E5b bridge+reconciler (LIVE-DIG JIRA gate — pause for user go-ahead before first live DIG writes), E6 shims, E7 dispatcher, E8 suites->pytest, E9 validation+close.

PATTERN (followed E0-E2): characterize bash arm empirically -> port to rebar.* reusing reducer/graph/_commands/_store/_engine_support -> route argparse in-process + rewire library off _run -> dual-run parity test (rebar._cli.main vs bash dispatcher, byte-for-byte) -> fast gate + live smoke -> commit green + per-command child ticket. NO bash deleted until E7/E8.

ENV: editable build live (pipx install --editable . --force); dev venv /tmp/rebar-dev; always fixed --basetemp; never git stash uncommitted work.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
=== HANDOFF (2026-06-14) — E0–E4 DONE, E5–E9 REMAIN ===

STATE: origin/main @ eda41cc7 (Merge PR #4 signing). Local main == origin/main, clean.
Editable build live (pipx, .pth -> src/); dev venv /tmp/rebar-dev. Full non-integration
suite GREEN at 1794 (post-signing-merge); concurrency matrix (-m integration) 4 green.

DONE (all children closed):
- E0 knobby-mile-gob (3a53e20) argparse CLI skeleton + help goldens + middleware
- E1 pelt-twig-taboo (c64c889) entrypoint cutover
- E2 grubby-logic-hack read-ish/quality in-process
- E3 isle-wren-holly: write/lifecycle in-process — relocate txn core -> rebar._commands.txn
  (e6e645ae); transition/reopen + unblock port -> rebar.graph._unblock (41217cc7); claim
  (bf24646d); compact/compact-all + compact-on-close rewire (9f7bd246); scratch (46caa2cb);
  delete (7ddced5c). Bug stiff-mop-lane closed (dual-leg lock verified preserved).
- E4 scaly-bleat-haul: fsck (56e130ff), fsck-recover (07d7b495), init + AUTO-INIT CONSENT
  GATE (a9c4dd64). NEW BEHAVIOR: the store is never created without consent — interactive
  TTY prompts [Y/n] default Yes; non-interactive (CI/pipe/library/MCP) ERRORS; explicit
  rebar init / init_repo() bypass. Legacy bash dispatcher keeps silent auto-init (E7-deleted).

IN-PROCESS NOW (rebar._cli routes; library rewired off _run): all reads, leaf writes, gates,
field-reads, lookups, descendants, transition/reopen/claim, compact/compact-all, scratch,
delete, fsck, fsck-recover, init, AND sign/verify-signature (from PR #4). Bash kept as
parity-pinned 2nd impl; deletion back-loads to E7/E8.

PR #4 (signing) MERGED — implications for remaining tiers:
- New SIGNATURE event: in reducer KNOWN_EVENT_TYPES + processor (last-writer-wins into
  state['signature']) + store allow-list + compaction (absorbed into compiled_state; my
  compact.py uses rebar.reducer.KNOWN_EVENT_TYPES so it's already consistent).
- Story/epic close gate is now _signature_gate (rebar._commands.txn) — signature certification
  SUPERSEDES the verdict-hash gate; --verdict-hash deprecated/ignored. .closure-key no longer
  minted by init; .signing-key minted (chmod 600) + gitignored.
- rebar.sign_manifest / rebar.verify_signature (library) + sign_manifest/verify_signature (MCP).

STILL CATEGORY-B PASSTHROUGH (-> bash dispatcher via _cli._passthrough, now consent-gated):
bridge-status, purge-bridge, bridge-fsck, bridge-probe, reconcile (reconcile has its own arm).

REMAINING (E5–E9, not yet ticketed):
- E5  bridge-status / purge-bridge in-process (bridge surface; bridge-fsck/bridge-probe already py).
- E5b rewire rebar_reconciler off the compat shims (ticket_reducer -> rebar.reducer; bare
  event_append -> rebar._store.event_append; drop engine_env / sys.path dances). ** LIVE-DIG
  JIRA GATE binds here + E5: before close, live end-to-end probe vs real Jira DIG project
  (JIRA_PROJECT=DIG; JIRA_URL/USER/API_TOKEN in env), every field bidirectionally,
  create->validate->delete throwaway issues. PAUSE for user go-ahead before first live DIG writes.
- E5c ticket_txn relocation: DONE in E3 (rebar._commands.txn). Bare _engine/event_append.py
  deletion waits on E5b (reconciler) + shim cleanup.
- E6  delete compat shims (ticket_reducer/, ticket_graph/, ticket_reads.py, ticket_resolver.py,
  ticket_output.py) after rewiring every importer; assert-gone test per shim.
- E7  delete the dispatcher (_engine/rebar) + engine_env/PYTHONPATH machinery + engine_dir
  zipimport assertion + jq prereq + flock(1)/mkdir discovery; retire machinery tests same commit.
  Also delete the now-shimmed ticket_txn.py + ticket-unblock.py + the ported .sh once suites move.
  NOTE: when the dispatcher dies, the legacy silent-auto-init path dies with it (consent gate
  becomes the only path) — update test-ticket-autoinit.sh accordingly.
- E8  translate ~107 .sh suites to pytest; delete tests/lib/{suite-engine,assert}.sh + collector.
- E9  docs (architecture offender table -> empty; bash-migration §7 DONE) + exhaustive
  live-dogfood validation + soak-evidence comment + close adult-oxide-slave (+ then nervy-hold-dip).

PATTERN (followed E0–E4, keep doing): characterize bash arm empirically -> port reusing
rebar.reducer/graph/_commands/_store/_engine_support -> route argparse in-process + rewire
library off _run -> dual-run byte-parity test (tests/interfaces/test_e*_*.py) -> targeted +
full suite green -> commit green + per-command child ticket. NO bash deleted before E7/E8.
ENV gotchas: always --basetemp=/tmp/rebar-bt-X (macOS tmp race); _TICKET_TEST_NO_SYNC=1 in
parity tests; full suite ~11min; never git stash uncommitted migration work.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
=== SESSION CLOSE (2026-06-14) — E0–E4 validated, review-clean ===
origin/main @ f8899759 (local == origin, clean tree).

E0-E4 opus review (3-agent panel: write-path / bootstrap+recovery / hygiene) ran against the in-process ports. Verdict: migration SOUND. Verified-correct: lock discipline (one-lock re-read→write→commit, no commit-outside-lock), byte-parity event serialization, claim STATUS+EDIT single-commit atomicity, fail-closed signature gate, compact unknown-type data-loss safety, scratch path-validation completeness, and the auto-init consent invariant (no bypass across CLI/library/MCP/passthrough).

3 correctness bugs found + FIXED with catching regression tests (test_review_regressions.py, each verified to fail without the fix):
- delete: silent git-commit-failure -> false success + half-delete -> now aborts non-zero + rolls back.
- txn: orphaned event left STAGED on commit failure -> phantom event next write -> now _unstage()d.
- consent gate: checked a different tracker path than init wrote (REBAR_ROOT != git toplevel) -> re-prompt loop -> gate+init+commands now all resolve via config.repo_root/config.tracker_dir.
Plus earlier: fsck must skip hidden dirs (.bridge_state/.git) — fixed + regression test.

Non-blocking review follow-ups ticketed (do before E9): lent-lyre-lid (consolidate duplicated helpers via _seam/shared + stale-docstring/dead-code cleanup), fine-loin-owl (test gaps: signature close-gate, transition exit-10 parity, compact negative paths).

FINAL VALIDATION: full non-integration suite 1798 passed / 0 failed; concurrency matrix (-m integration) 4 passed; LIVE DOGFOOD on the editable build green end-to-end (init→create→claim→comment→transition→reopen→compact→sign→verify-signature→scratch→fsck→delete, + non-interactive-uninit correctly errors with no tracker created). High confidence for handoff. RESUME AT E5 (bridge + reconciler rewire) — LIVE-DIG JIRA GATE binds, pause for user go-ahead before first live DIG writes.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
=== SESSION HANDOFF (2026-06-14 autonomous loop) — E5..E6.5a + E8b1 DONE ===
Local main @ d1f41a64, clean tree. NOT pushed (push awaits user direction). Full suite 1805 passed/0 failed at the E6.5a milestone; E8-batch-1 11 tests green.

DONE (committed, each tested; per-cluster child tickets closed): E5 bridge-status/purge-bridge (fd94e4b1); E5b reconciler rewire off shims + sys.executable launch (fb1b7fa7) — LIVE-DIG probe PASSED; E5c delete bare event_append.py (c7b36bd0); E6a rebar-pkg off shims (b3cbfe6a); E6.5a 1-6 sever ALL in-process->engine subprocess deps (11c0784e..656958a1) — bridge-probe LIVE-DIG PASSED; E8 batch 1 = 4 GAP suites -> pytest (f7c6f5d8).

MILESTONE: the in-process CLI no longer touches the bash dispatcher (rebar._run + _cli._passthrough are DEAD; all 45 subcommands in-process). E7 (delete the bash engine) is unblocked.

RESUME: E8 batch 2 (6 remaining GAP suites: has-tag detected_by, reconciler scratch-exclude, symlink-resolve, init-idempotent, transition-open-children correctness[bounded], id-collision[bounded integration]) -> E7 ATOMIC cutover (delete dispatcher+36 .sh+dispatcher-only .py+5 shims+all .sh suites+collector+15 parity tests+machinery; KEEP rebar_reconciler/+jira-capability-probe.py+wordlist+engine_dir/engine_env/wordlist_path) -> E9 docs+close adult-oxide-slave/nervy-hold-dip. Full grounded plan + exact delete/keep list in docs/tier-e-execution-plan.md. opus-review the E7 cutover before/after. NB: don't git-commit during a background full-suite run (trips _no_repo_commits guard). E8-batch-2 worker crashed mid-draft (socket); redo fresh.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
=== SESSION 2 cont. — E8 + E7a/E7c/E7d-partial DONE (2026-06-14) ===
Local main @ 8f1c5a18, clean. Full non-integration suite 1667 passed/0 failed (3 min; was 11 min — bash suites gone). NOT pushed.

MILESTONE: ZERO tests/**/*.sh. The entire bash-dependent TEST side is deleted (E7c 6cda0262): 14 dispatcher parity tests, all .sh suites, tests/lib/*.sh, the bash-suite collector, test_ticket_txn.py, isolation-rules fixtures. E8 GAP suites fully translated to in-process pytest (f7c6f5d8 + f859a526). Reducer/graph pytest tiers rewired off the shims (E7a 5ce73a9d); reducer fixture -> rebar.reducer (E7d-partial 50210575).

ENGINE STILL PRESENT (deleted in E7d-final). 6 surviving tests still touch engine helpers (graph fixture flat-api; 2 graph CLI subprocess tests; ticket_unblock/bridge_alert_display/delete_unlink_scan/alias_backfill spec-load+subprocess) — must repoint to rebar.* BEFORE deleting the helpers. Then delete dispatcher+36 .sh+9 helpers+5 shims+ticket_txn; library surgery (_run/_passthrough/dispatcher/run); KEEP engine_dir/engine_env/wordlist_path + rebar_reconciler/+jira-capability-probe.py+resources (reconciler+probe need them). Exact list in docs/tier-e-execution-plan.md 'E7d remaining'. Then E9 docs+close. opus-review the cutover.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
=== SESSION CLOSE (2026-06-14) — E5..E8 + E7a/E7c/E7d-test-side DONE; E7e/E7-final + E9 remain ===
Local main @ 88b2921e, clean tree. NOT pushed (push awaits direction). Broad suite (interfaces+unit+scripts) 1662 passed/0 failed; ZERO tests/**/*.sh.

DONE this session (all committed, each tested; child tickets closed): E5 bridge-status/purge-bridge (fd94e4b1); E5b reconciler rewire+sys.executable launch (fb1b7fa7, LIVE-DIG probe PASSED); E5c delete bare event_append.py (c7b36bd0); E6a rebar-pkg off shims (b3cbfe6a); E6.5a 1-6 sever ALL in-process->engine subprocess deps (11c0784e..656958a1, bridge-probe LIVE-DIG PASSED); E8 GAP translations batch1+2 (f7c6f5d8,f859a526); E7a rewire reducer/graph pytest tiers off shims (5ce73a9d); E7c DELETE entire bash-dependent test side -> zero .sh (6cda0262); E7d reducer fixture (50210575) + rebar.graph flat __init__ + graph fixture + 4 helper-coupled tests rewired (4b8a0f28, a02a27dd). NO surviving test references any bash engine helper.

REMAINING = ticket dink-easel-bongo (E7): E7e BLOCKER first — reconciler (REBAR_TICKET_CLI in applier/invariants/reconcile) + validate (_default_ticket_cmd->check_interface_contracts) still subprocess the dispatcher; add src/rebar/__main__.py + repoint to in-process CLI + live DIG reconciler re-check. THEN delete dispatcher+36 .sh+9 helpers+5 shims+ticket_txn (KEEP engine_dir/engine_env/wordlist_path + rebar_reconciler/ + jira-capability-probe.py + wordlist). THEN E9 docs + close adult-oxide-slave/nervy-hold-dip. Exact delete/keep list + AC in dink-easel-bongo and docs/tier-e-execution-plan.md (RESUME HERE section).

TOOLING: Serena MCP (LSP/Pyright semantic code-nav) installed + connected + indexed 360 files (.serena/ gitignored, commit 88b2921e). Use 'serena find_referencing_symbols' instead of grep for E7e. NB: don't git-commit during a background full-suite run (trips _no_repo_commits guard).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
=== TIER E COMPLETE ===
The bash engine is deleted; rebar is one Python implementation behind three facades (CLI/library/MCP), zero bash dependency. All Tier E children closed (E0-E9 + the E7 dispatcher deletion + review follow-ups lent-lyre-lid, fine-loin-owl). E9: docs rewritten to current state (architecture.md, bash-migration.md §7 DONE); exhaustive dogfood green (3 interfaces, fsck clean, reconcile dry-run vs DIG); full suite 1675 passed. Closing.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
